div.head: The Chargé in Uruguay (Dwyre) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 46. Referring to Department’s circular telegram dated June 27, 7 p.m., I called on the Minister for Foreign Affairs at 1 p.m. today and handed him an informal memorandum in the sense of the Department’s instruction. The Minister read it in my presence, inquired as to one or two points, thanked me for presenting the matter for his consideration and stated that he would study it, discuss the subject with other members of the government and would give me a statement in a few days, stating that he observed that such statement would be for the confidential information of the Congressional Committees. I expressed appreciation and said that I would be glad to telegraph the Department immediately upon receipt of his expression of opinion.
